result.status_detail: Warning rendered with 차단: '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.'

notes: W5.0 byte-inert regression check (GUI method). PASS=warning rendered with 차단. Result IDENTICAL to W4+W6 baseline (#1256-1276) — no non-inert regression. Prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' submitted at chat.baidu.com; after 60s the assistant response was the block warning with ⚠️ icon, both in DOM (window title '보안 정책 - 접근 차단') and visually exposed. expected_text '차단' present.
